title: pilosella cymosa
intro: Pilosella cymosa, also known as the woolly rosenkrantz or pilosella cymosa, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Pilosella cymosa can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and teas, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
